chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7897 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Asadullah Soomro, advocate for respondents 3, 4 & 5 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. This petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
